ResearchProjectDef.label: Flake
ResearchProjectDef.description: Manufacture a flaky white preparation of psychite that can be smoked to induce a short but powerful euphoric state. While it is cheap to produce and extremely pleasurable to use, it is exceptionally addictive.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Smokeleaf joint
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce smokeleaf leaves prepared in small rolls for smoking.
